name: openjanus
description: Skills for building on the OpenJanus v0.8 privacy stack — JanusFlow (native FLOW), JanusERC20 (ERC20), JanusFT (Cadence FT), ShieldedInbox/Checkpoint primitives, claimBatch(N=10), wrapWithProof with anti-replay nonces, Pedersen2Gen homomorphic accumulation, Groth16 proof generation (pot22 ceremony), and cross-VM COA patterns on Flow.
